summary: Frontend-only testing of admin panel UI overhaul (next-gen futuristic redesign). Tested all 11 specified features via Playwright automation. All critical UI features passed successfully.

issues: Hero banner background is --aa-primary (dark navy #0f172a) in both light and dark themes - by design this provides high contrast but the hero always appears dark regardless of theme. This is intentional design.

action_items: Minor: Remove unused `import { Command } from 'cmdk'` in frontend/src/components/admin/CommandPalette.tsx (the component uses a custom implementation, not cmdk's Command component)
critical_code_review_comments: CommandPalette.tsx imports `Command` from 'cmdk' but never uses it - dead import, safe to remove

The accordion `toggleSection` logic collapses an already-open section on click. If the active tab's section is the expanded one, clicking it collapses it (hiding the active tab). This is correct accordion behavior but could confuse users - considered acceptable UX.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel UI overhaul complete and fully verified. Key features: Space Grotesk font (global), glassmorphic sidebar (.aa-sidebar), collapsible sidebar (210px ↔ 64px via sidebar-collapse-btn), section accordions (people/commerce/content/settings/integrations - tested toggle), Command Palette (⌘K / Ctrl+K shortcut, cmd-open-btn, sidebar-search-trigger, sidebar-search-icon in collapsed mode), tab navigation with icons. All existing functionality (customers list, create customer modal, products tab) confirmed working. Test credentials: partner_code=automate-accounts, email=mayank@automateaccounts.com, password=ChangeMe123!

features_tested.sidebar_icons_visible: PASS - Users, Customers, Products, Filters, Subscriptions, Orders, Enquiries, Org Info, Taxes, Auth Pages, Forms, Email Templates, References, Custom Domains all have icons
features_tested.tab_navigation: PASS - Users, Customers, Orders, Org Info, Products tabs all navigate correctly
features_tested.cmd_palette_opens: PASS - Opens via hero ⌘K button, sidebar search trigger, Ctrl+K shortcut
features_tested.cmd_palette_blurred_backdrop: PASS - aa-cmd-backdrop with backdrop-filter: blur(4px) visible
features_tested.cmd_palette_sections: PASS - People, Commerce, Content, Settings, Integrations, Platform, My Billing sections visible
features_tested.cmd_palette_filter: PASS - Typing 'order' shows Orders/Partner Orders/My Orders (3 results)
features_tested.cmd_palette_navigate_close: PASS - Clicking item navigates to tab and closes palette
features_tested.section_accordion: PASS - All section headers toggle open/close correctly
features_tested.create_customer_form: PASS - Modal opens with all form fields
features_tested.products_tab: PASS - Loads with product list (8 products)
features_tested.keyboard_shortcut: PASS - Ctrl+K opens palette, Escape closes it
features_tested.space_grotesk_font: PASS - Body font-family: 'Space Grotesk', Inter, sans-serif
features_tested.active_indicator: PASS - Active nav item has .active class with blue left bar indicator
